AJAMAGHOULIGAN-STOLEN_PHYLACTERY.title: Stolen Phylactery
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-STOLEN_PHYLACTERY.descrip:
At the start of each combat, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue].
At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{LoseDoom}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-STOLEN_PHYLACTERY.flavor: It beats as if irritated. Even though I'm her friend!
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERCHARGED_PHYLACTERY.de:
At the start of each combat, [gold]Summon[/gold] [blue]{Summon}[/blue].
At the start of your turn, lose [blue]{LoseDoom}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-OVERCHARGED_PHYLACTERY.fl: Ah, that's much better! I hope ya don't mind, Bindy!
SEA_GLASS.AJAMAGHOULIGAN.title: Spectre Glass
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-FUNNY_BONE.title: Funny Bone
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAGE_SCRAP.title: Page Scrap
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAGE_SCRAP.description: Card rewards from combats gain an additional [gold]Necrobinder[/gold] card.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-PAGE_SCRAP.flavor: Silly Bindy, always leaving these things everywhere.
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-WARDED_BRACELET.title: Warded Bracelet
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-WARDED_BRACELET.descripti: Whenever you apply [gold]Doom[/gold] to yourself, lose [blue]{LoseDoom}[/blue] [gold]Doom[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-WARDED_BRACELET.flavor: It kinda stings, but it's weirdly soothing too!
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CREEPY_DOLL.title: Creepy Doll
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CREEPY_DOLL.description: #At the start of your turn, [gold]Haunt[/gold] [blue]{Haunt}[/blue] random card(s) in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
AJAMAGHOULIGAN-CREEPY_DOLL.flavor: It's literally so cutes, but I swear I saw it move earlier...
